{"desc":"操作成功","rspcode":200,"success":true,"data":{"dataCount":7,"currentPage":1,"numberPerPage":400,"data":[["活跃用户数","上日活跃用户当日留存率","新增活跃用户数","上日新增活跃用户本日留存率","存量活跃用户数","上日存量活跃用户本日留存率","月累计活跃用户数","日期","重点产品名称","省份","地市"],["active_users","active_rate","new_active_users","new_active_rate","stay_active_users","stay_active_rate","active_users_mtd","period_id","client_type","province_name","city_name"],["30,128",48.89,"48.89%","2,993",26.0,"26.00%","27,135",51.34,"51.34%","313,762","20260420","咪咕快游","上海","上海"],["331,101",47.13,"47.13%","5,581",20.49,"20.49%","325,520",47.74,"47.74%","2,299,541","20260420","咪咕视频","上海","上海"],["272,825",53.59,"53.59%","50,849",52.19,"52.19%","221,976",53.92,"53.92%","1,292,615","20260420","咪咕音乐","上海","上海"],["58,323",36.36,"36.36%","3,954",1.22,"1.22%","54,369",40.58,"40.58%","472,725","20260420","咪咕阅读","上海","上海"],["318,133",39.78,"39.78%","5,223",9.1,"9.10%","312,910",40.31,"40.31%","2,334,943","20260421","咪咕视频","上海","上海"],["28,555",49.99,"49.99%","1,761",21.68,"21.68%","26,794",53.11,"53.11%","323,029","20260421","咪咕快游","上海","上海"],["242,081",52.17,"52.17%","27,032",52.59,"52.59%","215,049",52.07,"52.07%","1,324,651","20260421","咪咕音乐","上海","上海"]],"sql":"SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT t_2.active_users AS \"M_1\", ROUND(t_2.active_rate,2) AS \"M_2_SUFFIX\",  CASE WHEN  CAST(ROUND(t_2.active_rate,2) as char(100)) != '' THEN CONCAT( CAST(ROUND(t_2.active_rate,2) as char(100)),'%') ELSE ROUND(t_2.active_rate,2) END  AS \"M_2\", t_2.new_active_users AS \"M_3\", ROUND(t_2.new_active_rate,2) AS \"M_4_SUFFIX\",  CASE WHEN  CAST(ROUND(t_2.new_active_rate,2) as char(100)) != '' THEN CONCAT( CAST(ROUND(t_2.new_active_rate,2) as char(100)),'%') ELSE ROUND(t_2.new_active_rate,2) END  AS \"M_4\", t_2.stay_active_users AS \"M_5\", ROUND(t_2.stay_active_rate,2) AS \"M_6_SUFFIX\",  CASE WHEN  CAST(ROUND(t_2.stay_active_rate,2) as char(100)) != '' THEN CONCAT( CAST(ROUND(t_2.stay_active_rate,2) as char(100)),'%') ELSE ROUND(t_2.stay_active_rate,2) END  AS \"M_6\", t_2.active_users_mtd AS \"M_7\", t_2.period_id AS \"D_0\", t_2.client_type AS \"D_2\", t_2.province_name AS \"D_7\", t_2.city_name AS \"D_11\" FROM `bvreport`.`hhweb_user_active_scene_index_2022_d` t_2 WHERE t_2.client_type != '全部' AND t_2.client_type != '咪咕圈圈' AND t_2.client_type != '云分发' AND t_2.channel_level1 = '全部' AND t_2.channel_level2 = '全部' AND t_2.period_id >= '20260420' AND t_2.period_id <= '20260421' AND t_2.pid1_2022 IN('全部') AND t_2.pid2_2022 IN('全部') AND t_2.pid3_2022 IN('全部') AND t_2.pid4_2022 IN('全部') AND t_2.province_name IN('上海') AND t_2.user_type IN('总体') AND case when t_2.city_name is null  then \"全省\" else t_2.city_name  end IN('上海')) dataTable )AS firstTopTable  LIMIT 0,400","columns":[{"columnAlias":"M_1","isThousand":"YES","name":"活跃用户数","columnName":"active_users"},{"columnAlias":"M_2","isThousand":"NO","name":"上日活跃用户当日留存率","columnName":"active_rate"},{"columnAlias":"M_3","isThousand":"YES","name":"新增活跃用户数","columnName":"new_active_users"},{"columnAlias":"M_4","isThousand":"NO","name":"上日新增活跃用户本日留存率","columnName":"new_active_rate"},{"columnAlias":"M_5","isThousand":"YES","name":"存量活跃用户数","columnName":"stay_active_users"},{"columnAlias":"M_6","isThousand":"NO","name":"上日存量活跃用户本日留存率","columnName":"stay_active_rate"},{"columnAlias":"M_7","isThousand":"YES","name":"月累计活跃用户数","columnName":"active_users_mtd"},{"columnAlias":"D_0","isThousand":null,"name":"日期","columnName":"period_id"},{"columnAlias":"D_2","isThousand":null,"name":"重点产品名称","columnName":"client_type"},{"columnAlias":"D_7","isThousand":null,"name":"省份","columnName":"province_name"},{"columnAlias":"D_11","isThousand":null,"name":"地市","columnName":"city_name"}],"sumData":{},"location":null,"sumDataSql":null}}
